params.label: Population A
params.tip: The cells to annotate — for each, the nearest B cell and whether it is in contact.

params.label: Population B (target)
params.tip: The target population. May span segmentations (e.g. a different cell type). Contact = an A cell within the distance threshold of any B cell.

params.label: Contact distance (µm)
params.tip: Centroid distance (microns) at or below which an A cell counts as in contact with B. Points route — for surface-level contact on large/live cells use the mesh route.
